meta.title: MongoDB Integration with Drizzle ORM (Nova - Bun/Elysia+Effect)

task.role: You are a Senior Node.js Engineer with expertise in server-side JavaScript and APIs. Implement Task 18 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Connect to MongoDB using Drizzle ORM for integration configs and templates
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 17 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Add Drizzle ORM with MongoDB adapter
2. Define schemas for integrations and templates
3. Configure database connection with Effect
4. Implement CRUD operations as Effect services
5. Add database health checks

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-18): MongoDB Integration with Drizzle ORM (Nova - Bun/Elysia+Effect)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
MongoDB connections successful, can create/read/update/delete integration records via Drizzle

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
